creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
/usr/share/misc/fonts/
======================

Removed from hier(7) by <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/pull/763/commits/99b1bc9b46ce95def332adb1195c1b534d3fd3a2>. 

In addition, there was a suggestion (in IRC) to remove the directory from base. 


/var/preserve/
======================

From <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/pull/763#discussion_r1224598270>: 

> … Probably we could go further and purge it from the src tree, 
> including the (useless?) clean-preserve periodic(8) script. …
